headline: RBC Capital Initiates Coverage On Public Service Enterprise with Sector Perform Rating, Announces Price Target of $81
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Stephen D'Ambrisi   initiates coverage on Public Service Enterprise (NYSE:PEG) with a Sector Perform rating and announces Price Target of $81.
